name: 2channel (2ch)
description: The anonymous imageboard that defined Japanese internet culture — birthplace of countless memes, subcultures, and the model for 4chan.
content_note: Anonymous forum threads covering every topic imaginable in Japanese internet culture.

name: Nifty Serve Web
description: Japan's answer to AOL — one of the first mass-market internet portals that brought millions of Japanese users online for the first time.
content_note: Email, news, chat rooms, and early Japanese web directories.

name: GeoCities Japan
description: The Japanese branch of GeoCities — home to millions of personal pages featuring anime fan art, J-pop lyrics, and elaborate table-based layouts.
content_note: Personal homepages, anime fan sites, and hobby pages in Japanese.
